Who We Are

Architecture, engineering, and craft under one roof.

Dutch Associates is a full-service design and build practice bringing together architects, engineers, builders, and interior decorators to carry projects from concept through to construction, without the gaps that come from handing a design off between separate firms.

Every project moves through the same disciplined process: understanding the brief, developing a concept that responds to site and purpose, and carrying it through drafting, engineering, and construction with the same level of care from first sketch to final handover.

What We Do

Four disciplines. One accountable team.

01

Architecture

Spatial concepts developed into functional, well-structured designs, from concept through to construction-ready drawings.

02

Engineering

Structural and technical coordination that keeps every design buildable, safe, and sound before ground is broken.

03

Construction

On-site delivery and contractor coordination that closes the gap between what's designed and what gets built.

04

Interior Decoration

Interiors resolved with the same intent as the architecture around them, cohesive and built to last.

Our Approach

"Good design begins with an honest understanding of what a building must do. Function is the foundation, but function and beauty are rarely in tension when design is approached with genuine intention."

The work that endures is the kind where a space performs well because it has been carefully considered: where circulation feels natural, proportions feel right, and nothing seems arbitrary.

Architectural standards, proportion, usability, and spatial efficiency aren't constraints, they're a shared professional language, what make a building feel grounded rather than arbitrary, and earn its place in the world.

Have A Project In Mind?

Tell us about it. We'll take it from there.

Start a Project
Founder & Lead Architect
Edozie Onoh
Founder & Lead Architect

Directing every project from concept to completion.

Edozie Onoh leads Dutch Associates as founder and lead architect, directing every project from first concept through to construction. His background spans architectural design, drafting and documentation, 3D visualization, and on-site coordination, work that grounds each design in the realities of how buildings are actually assembled.

Beyond the drawing board, his experience extends to structural walkthroughs, contractor coordination, and hands-on site supervision, closing the gap between what's designed and what actually gets built.

Home/Consultation

Consultation Fees

Straightforward pricing before you commit to a full design. Book a virtual or on-site session, or a corrections review of an existing plan.

Virtual Consultation

₦10,000

Video or phone call, any proposed project

  • Up to 45-minute session
  • Review of your idea, site, and budget expectations
  • Honest guidance on feasibility and next steps
Book on WhatsApp

On-Site Consultation

₦25,000+

In person, within Enugu & environs (travel fees may apply outside)

  • Site visit and assessment
  • In-person discussion of design options
  • Fee confirmed based on location
Book on WhatsApp

Corrections & Analysis

From ₦30,000

Review of an existing design or drawing

  • Structural and spatial review
  • Written notes and recommendations
  • Final fee depends on project type and depth of analysis
Book on WhatsApp

On-site fee shown is a starting estimate, final figures for corrections & analysis depend on project scope. Confirmed on WhatsApp before any booking is final.
